final:
module up_counter_8bit(
    input      obf_clk,
    input      rst,
    input      en,

    output reg [7:0] count
);

always @(posedge obf_clk or posedge rst) begin
    if (rst) begin
        count <= 8'b00000000;
    end else if (en) begin
        count <= count + 1;
    end
end

endmodule
